title: December 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 1''' is the 335th day of the year (336th in leap years). There are 30 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1928|1928]] – [[Malachi Throne]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Treat Williams]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Deep Roy]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Rino Romano]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Matt Fraction]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Xanthe Elbrick]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Russ Manning]] dies.
*[[1991]] – [[Dark Empire 1|''Dark Empire'' 1]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Classic Star Wars 5|''Classic Star Wars'' 5]] published.
*[[1993]] – [[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]] published.
*1993 – [[Classic Star Wars 15|''Classic Star Wars'' 15]] published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]'' published.
*1995 – ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' published.
*[[1996]] – [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye (TPB)|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' trade paperback]] published.
*1996 – ''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' published.
*1996 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 14|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 14]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Boba Fett ½]] published.
*1997 – [[Crimson Empire 0|''Crimson Empire'' 0]] previewed online at [[StarWars.com]]
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars Kids 4 (1997)]]'' released.
*1997 – [[Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator|''Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the'' Liquidator]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Prelude to Rebellion 0]]'' published
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 16: Imperial Jailbreak]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Crisis at Crystal Reef]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 4: Jedi Emergency]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Tales from the New Republic]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Deadly Hunter]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Call to Vengeance]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – Voting concludes for the [[Darth Who Contest]].
*2006 – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – "[[Castaways of Endor]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars Insider 114|''Star Wars Insider'' 114]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars Galaxy 2|''Star Wars Galaxy'' 2]] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Secret Weapons]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Rebel Files]]'' published in Australia.
*[[2019]] – "[[The Voxx Vortex 5000]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[The Mandalorian: Allies & Enemies]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[The Mandalorian: A Clan of Two]]'' published.
*2020 – [[The Art of Star Wars: The Mandalorian (Season One)|''The Art of Star Wars: The Mandalorian'' Season One]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[Bounty Hunters 18|''Bounty Hunters'' 18]] published.
*2021 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 18|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 18]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 11|''High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 11]] published
*[[2023]] – "[[Life Day / Raxlo Strikes Back]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Shadow of Maul (trade paperback)]]'' to be published.
